decks.notes: The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana and utilizing combo pieces such as Amulet of Vigor and Primeval Titan to establish a strong board presence and overwhelm the opponent. It uses lands like Urza's Saga and Gruul Turf to generate additional mana and allows for explosive plays with cards like Scapeshift to search for specific lands and win the game in one turn. The deck also includes support cards such as Green Sun's Zenith and Arboreal Grazer to ensure consistency and enable faster combos. Ultimately, the goal is to assemble key pieces and execute a game-winning combo.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. It utilizes efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, along with removal spells like Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm to control the board. The inclusion of cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury provide additional threats and ways to push through damage. The deck also includes some utility lands and a couple of planeswalkers to provide additional value and flexibility in different situations.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a mix of aggressive creatures and burn spells. The key strategy is to establish a strong early board presence with efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, while using burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to clear blockers and finish off opponents. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory provide additional support and buffs to the team. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Seasoned Pyromancer to control the battlefield.

This deck focuses on quickly building a board presence and dealing damage to the opponent as fast as possible. It utilizes efficient creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Dragon's Rage Channeler along with burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart to quickly chip away at the opponent's life total. The deck also includes cards like Violent Urge and Monstrous Rage to help push through damage and finish off the opponent. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells before they have a chance to stabilize.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifact creatures and artifacts to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays and efficient resource management. By utilizing cards like Urza's Saga to generate tokens and Pinnacle Emissary to pump up creatures, the deck aims to create a fast clock and close out games before the opponent can stabilize. The inclusion of cards like Metallic Rebuke and Engineered Explosives helps to disrupt the opponent's strategies and protect the deck's threats. Overall, the deck aims to win through a combination of aggression and resource denial.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on generating quick and aggressive board presence through efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury. It also includes burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm to maintain pressure on the opponent. The deck utilizes cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Arena of Glory to provide additional support and buff creatures, while Goblin Bombardment and Ocelot Pride offer ways to deal direct damage to the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Guide of Souls and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker adds resilience and card advantage to keep the pressure on the opponent.

This deck aims to quickly assemble the combo of Basking Broodscale, Glaring Fleshraker, and Blade of the Bloodchief to create a powerful board presence that can overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing cards like Ancient Stirrings and Urza's Saga to find key pieces and control the game with removal spells, the deck can set up explosive turns and win the game in a single swing. The strategy revolves around maximizing the synergy between creatures and equipment to create an unstoppable force on the battlefield.

The deck focuses on generating mana quickly and efficiently through rituals and synergies with cards like Ruby Medallion and Ral, Monsoon Mage. It aims to cast multiple spells in a turn to build up a storm count and then finish off opponents with a massive Grapeshot or Past in Flames combo. The deck also runs disruption in the form of Blood Moon and relies on card selection and draw to find key pieces. It is a fast-paced and explosive combo deck that can win out of nowhere with the right setup.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to play aggressively and quickly, using low-cost creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Cori-Steel Cutter along with powerful spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart to deal damage to the opponent swiftly. The deck also utilizes cards like Mishra's Bauble and Expressive Iteration for card advantage and selection, allowing the player to maintain pressure on the opponent while digging for answers. Overall, the deck aims to win the game as quickly as possible through a combination of direct damage and efficient creatures.

This deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd to apply early pressure on the opponent. Quantum Riddler and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker provide additional card advantage and disruption. The deck also includes blink effects like Ephemerate to protect key creatures and generate value from enter-the-battlefield triggers. Consign to Memory and Solitude offer removal options, while Galvanic Discharge and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury provide reach to close out games. The mana base is fine-tuned for consistency and flexibility in casting spells.

This Dimir Control deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan through a combination of hand disruption, removal spells, and counterspells. It utilizes cards like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to control the board while also utilizing powerful creatures like Orcish Bowmasters and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares to apply pressure. The deck also includes powerful planeswalkers like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Wan Shi Tong, Librarian to generate card advantage. By efficiently controlling the game and disrupting the opponent's strategy, this deck aims to grind out a victory in the late game.

The deck focuses on aggressive plays with creatures like Ragavan and Phlage, using spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment for extra damage. The mana base is built around finding the right colors quickly with fetch lands and dual lands, with some disruption from cards like Blood Moon. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah serves as a powerful finisher, backed up by other threats like Guide of Souls and Seasoned Pyromancer. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of creatures, burn spells, and disruption.

The deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly with Eldrazi Temple and Utopia Sprawl, allowing for early plays of powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End and Ugin, the Eye of the Storms. It also includes control elements like Kozilek's Command and Malevolent Rumble to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with large threats while controlling the board through spells like Sowing Mycospawn and Nulldrifter. It has a mix of card advantage, removal, and big finishers to secure victory.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on utilizing powerful creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury to quickly overwhelm opponents. The deck also incorporates cards like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment for additional damage output. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and The Legend of Roku provide support and utility, while cards like Thraben Charm and Static Prison help disrupt opponent strategies. The deck's mana base is designed to support the aggressive game plan, with a mix of fetch lands and dual lands to ensure consistent access to the necessary colors of mana.

This deck aims to quickly fill up the graveyard with cards like Street Wraith and Generous Ent, then use cards like Living End to bring all creatures back onto the battlefield, overwhelming the opponent with a powerful board presence. Subtlety and Force of Negation can be used to protect the combo from disruption, while Endurance and Sink into Stupor can disrupt the opponent's game plan. Shardless Agent and Ardent Plea help to cascade into powerful spells, while cards like Overlord of the Balemurk and Misty Rainforest provide additional value and consistency to the deck.

The deck focuses on utilizing the UrzaTron lands to quickly ramp up mana and play powerful Eldrazi creatures, supported by control elements like Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, Eye of the Storms. It aims to control the board with removal spells like Dismember and Kozilek's Command while using cards like Thought-Knot Seer to disrupt opponent's strategies. The deck also includes various artifacts to further control the game, such as Chalice of the Void and Trinisphere, creating a versatile and powerful control archetype in Modern 1 vs 1 format.
